info.title: Ecomapp-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp-buildTime is an e-commerce platform API that facilitates product management, order processing, and user interactions in a seamless online shopping experience.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to managing product listings, including retrieval, creation, updating, and deletion of products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for processing customer orders, including creation, status updates, and tracking.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management features such as registration, authentication, profile updates, and user roles.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Add a new item to the specified user's cart by providing the cart item details in the request body. Returns the updated cart contents after the addition.

requestBody.description: The cart item to be added

200.description: The cart has been updated with the added item

400.description: Invalid request to add item to cart

example.message: The provided cart item details are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Product ID is missing or incorrect

500.description: Internal server error while adding item to cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the current shopping cart for a user
get.description: Fetch the list and details of all items currently in the specified user's shopping cart. Useful for displaying the cart contents before checkout.

400.description: Invalid request for retrieving cart items

example.message: The provided user ID is invalid or missing.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving cart items

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Create a new order for the specified user ID. This endpoint accepts order details in the request body and returns the created order information upon success.

items.description: List of items to include in the order

paymentMethod.description: Payment method chosen by the user

example.message: Order request body is missing required fields or contains invalid data.
The specified user ID does not exist.

details.issue: User ID not found in the system

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetch detailed information about a specific order using its unique order ID. Returns the order details including status, items, and pricing.

example.message: The provided order ID format is invalid.

details.issue: Order ID does not match expected format

example.message: No order found with the specified ID.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process by accepting payment details. The request body includes all the necessary information to initiate the transaction. On success, returns the payment response containing transaction identifiers and status.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request containing payment method, amount, currency, and payer details.

200.description: Returns the details of the initiated payment including transaction ID and status.

400.description: Bad Request - The payment initiation request is invalid or malformed.

example.message: The payment details provided are invalid or missing required fields.

details.issue: Card number is missing or invalid

402.description: Payment Required - Payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or payment declined.

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment provider.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An unexpected error occurred during payment initiation.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive and process payment provider webhook notifications
post.description: Endpoint to receive asynchronous webhook notifications from payment providers. The payload includes the status update or events related to a payment transaction. Processes the status change and responds with confirmation.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload sent by the payment provider containing payment event details.

200.description: Acknowledges successful receipt and processing of the webhook event.

400.description: Bad Request - The webhook payload is invalid or missing required information.

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.

402.description: Payment Required - The webhook event indicates a payment failure or declined payment.

example.message: Received a webhook indicating payment failure.

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected error occurred while processing the webhook.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog with details such as name, description, price, and stock. Returns the created product information including its unique identifier.

requestBody.description: Product details to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

example.message: Provided product information is invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product with the same identifier already exists

example.message: Product with the provided identifier already exists

details.issue: A product with this name already exists

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve shipping tracking information for an order
get.description: Fetches the current shipping status and detailed tracking information of a specific order identified by orderId. Useful for customers to monitor the progress of their shipment.

404.description: Order not found or tracking information unavailable

example.message: The specified orderId does not exist or tracking data is unavailable

details.issue: No order matches the provided identifier

example.message: The orderId format is invalid
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided user details. The request body must contain all required user information. On success, returns the created user profile.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid user registration data

example.message: The user data provided is invalid or incomplete.
A user with the given email or username already exists.

details.issue: Email must be unique but is already taken

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code of the item price, e.g., USD, EUR

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this cart item

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this item

price.description: Original price of the item before discount

quantity.description: Quantity of this product in the cart

currency.description: Currency code used in the cart summary

items.description: List of items present in the shopping cart

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the cart

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated (ISO 8601 format)

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

discount.description: Discount amount applied for this ordered item

finalPrice.description: Final price for this item after discount

price.description: Item price before discount was applied

productId.description: Unique identifier of the ordered product

productName.description: Name of the product in the order

currency.description: Currency code for the order transaction

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Amount payable for the order after discounts

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Aggregate discount applied on the order

userId.description: User identifier who placed the order

amount.description: Payment amount requested for the order

orderId.description: Identifier of the order being paid

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment chosen by the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created (ISO 8601)

orderId.description: Order identifier associated with the payment

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier from the payment gateway

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response message from the payment gateway webhook

paymentId.description: Identifier for the payment related to the webhook event

status.description: Current status of the payment as reported by the webhook

transactionId.description: Transaction ID provided by the payment gateway

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Number of units available in stock

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format

lastUpdated.description: Date and time when the tracking information was last updated

orderId.description: Identifier of the order associated with this tracking

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier provided by the courier

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

phone.description: Contact phone number of the user

userType.description: Type or role of the user

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the user was created

phone.description: Contact phone number of the user

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the user was last updated

userType.description: Type or role of the user

path.description: Request path where the error occurred

errorCode.description: Specific error code identifying the error

details.description: Array of specific field issues causing the error

field.description: Name of the field with an issue

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field
